properties.name: Scutainvicti Giant

properties.name: Mephra Cyclops
properties.legend: Inscriptions speak of a huge Cyclops who inhabits Mephra hills and eats kids whole.

properties.name: Blacktail Hydra

properties.name: Shadows Ogre

properties.name: Vormumen Giant

properties.name: Ironsh Troll

properties.name: Blacksmith Monster

properties.name: Ikeheim Sculpture
properties.legend:
An ancient sculpture. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
ᠡᠡᠮᡏᡎᠮᡜᡎ᠀ᠳᡍ᠐ᢢ᠑ᠯᡟᡟᢁᡒᢤᡀᢟᡭᡁᡰᢒᠨᠻᢟᡔᢦᡞ᠒᠑᠑ᠩᡜᢋᡀᡳᡰᠻᢀᢋᡠᡗᢏᠿᡭᢤᢞᡀᡝᡆᠿᢠᡞᡁᠲᠧ

properties.name: Hearthamer Column
properties.legend:
An ancient column. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
ፈፐሰተፀቀለከሀረ ደጠፀጠሐሐተጠሠዐነበረኀለየሰበከ ነአአለሰጠሰየቀደረበሀነቀረፀሠቀፈአፀረ ረ ሀ ሐደአጰ ፈ ረተጠደነወኀ

properties.name: Frostmender Megalith
properties.legend:
An ancient megalith. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
ᢤᠰᢋᢠᡲᢏᠳᢜᡎᢏᢁᢏᢥᡭᠳᢀᢥᠰᡔᡏ᠒ᠽ᠐ᡆᢞᡜᢁᢡᡒᡙᠭᡁᡍᡐᠲᢞ᠀ᢦᠼᠩᡐᢋᠠᢜᢟᠿᡜᡐᡙᡀᢛᠾᠮᢠᠩᢞᠻᡍᡗᠿᢓᠿᡑ

properties.name: Scutabi Idol
properties.legend:
An ancient idol. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
ዘ ኀየዐሐቀሀበከጠሐኀቀ ጠበከበ ሰሰ ወየደ ወ ገሀሐዐቀ ሀሰፈ ወደሠወሐዐዘሀተዘዘመ ዐሐጰነየወዐዐደ ሰገሐደ ኀመከ ነሰደሐረፀ ዐከጸከፀዐጠዐፀበጰ

properties.name: Canopybre Sculpture
properties.legend:
An ancient sculpture. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
ጠ ፐየፀለወበ ሐዘጰተተበዐተሀ ዐለወ ረፈነገሰፐሀፀ ጰከበጠለፈከፐመ ጸገገፀአጸጠደ ዐተዐጰቀሀነሐፈጰነ ከየለፈቀ

properties.name: Inoushout Monolith
properties.legend:
An ancient monolith. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
ⲴⳐⳄⳫⳘⳞⳚⳆⳆⳄⳄⳠ⳹ⳤ⳾ⳒⳆⳒⳐⳘⳬⳖ⳥ⳔⲺⲸⲶⲲ⳹⳾ⳐⳤⳖ⳪ⲶⳔⳲ⳥ⳤ⳾ⳞⳤⲸⳄⳆⳐⳀ⳧Ⲿ⳩ⲾⳖ

properties.name: Hearthrob Sculpture
properties.legend:
An ancient sculpture. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
༘༽་༽༚༉༰༕༲༰༯༨༑༤༊༼༿༑༣༨༻༳་༒༆༿༗༹༱༵༧༴༵༙༠༫ༀ༰༐༓

⳹ⳚⳬⳜ⳥ⲶⳠⳤⳄ ⳀⳌ⳹⳩Ⳣ⳩ⳚⲼⳈⳎⲾⳫⳫⳐⳎⳤⳆⳒⳔⳭⳌⳀ ⳊⳎⳒⳬ⳩ⳃ⳹ⳈⳀⳖⲲⲲⳃ⳪ⲼⳂⲶⳈⳆⳊ ⳾Ⳁ

Ⳇⳁ⳧ⳌⳌ⳥ⳚⳃⳂⲸⳤⳒⲼⳚⳢⲶⳀⳎ⳹ⳌⳀⳖ⳧ⳬⳄⳖ⳪ⳆⳘⳤⲲⳄ⳾⳹ⳊⳄⲸ⳪ⳤⲺ ⳥ⳔⳌⳈⳒⳘ⳥Ⳇ ⳩Ⳓ⳥ⲺⳚⳲⳠⳈⳄⳭ⳥Ⲷ ⳖⳘⲶ⳥ⳤⳚⲴ⳥ⲼⲼⳎ Ⲻ

An ancient obelisk. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
በወሀደመገሀዘ ተ የዘሠመዘዘ ፐበተጠጠረሠገሀገጠጰቀሰወወጠሠከሀነከበተፐሐበሰየበሰየሠጸዘ ጠከኀሀየ ሀፐነዐፈጠሠጠዐጠሰ ኀከጰየሀዐ በ ጠ ወየገሰ

properties.name: Heartrot Crypt
properties.legend: A sprawling necropolis built within a labyrinthine network of catacombs. Its halls are lined with countless alcoves, each housing the remains of the departed, while the distant sound of rattling bones fills the air.

properties.name: Thunwasp Cemetery
properties.legend: A foreboding necropolis perched atop a jagged cliff, overlooking a desolate wasteland. Its towering walls harbor restless spirits, and the imposing gates bear the marks of countless battles and ancient curses.

properties.name: Vebironcrus Necropolis
properties.legend: This ethereal necropolis seems suspended between the realms of the living and the dead. Wisps of mist dance around the tombstones, while haunting melodies linger in the air, commemorating the departed.

properties.name: Starflight Graveyard
properties.legend: A desolate necropolis where an eerie stillness reigns. Time seems frozen amidst the decaying mausoleums, and the silence is broken only by the whispers of the wind and the rustle of tattered banners.
